content:
🚀 server-survival | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Teaching cloud architecture and DevOps principles through an engaging game simulation.
✨ Key Features: • Interactive 3D simulation game • Learn cloud architecture concepts • Build and scale cloud infrastructure • Handle increasing traffic loads • Defend against DDoS attacks
📖 Summary: Server Survival is an educational 3D simulation game where players act as Cloud Architects. The game teaches cloud infrastructure concepts by challenging players to build, scale, and manage a resilient system to handle traffic loads, defend against attacks, and stay within budget.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
